metadata.description: Quantum-Native risk tooling from QRS (Patent QRS-001): free, local risk skills plus sealed, independently verifiable runs on the QRS quantum-native engine.

plugins.name: qrs
plugins.description: Free, local risk skills — catastrophe loss metrics (EP curves, AAL, return periods, VaR/TVaR), claim grounding, and Monte Carlo simulation — plus sealed, independently verifiable runs on the QRS quantum-native engine. Don't trust the number; re-run the seal and check it yourself.
